workflowHelp: Manually progress the order stage in this demo. This updates active tabs, selects worksheets, and completes milestones.
intakeDesc:
Paste a PO, email, DM, copied spreadsheet rows, or PDF text below.
Artisan extracts items and flags details that need answers.
uploadBrowse: or click to browse from your computer
uploadRejected: Some files were rejected by type or size.
safetyNote: Use fictional or redacted data only.
extractDesc: Products, quantities, and finishes are read from the order text.
answerDesc: Questions appear only when production details are unclear.
createDesc: Production sheet, packing checklist, and customer update become ready.
reviewSampleDesc: Load sample PO data to see how Artisan finds blockers.
startProcessingDesc: Process the order text to review production details.
reviewUnresolvedCount: {count} production details need answers before sheets can be created.
allResolved: All production details are answered. Sheets are ready.
starburstQuestion: Which Starburst size should Bali make?
starburstRisk: Size changes casting, stone layout, packing count, and production time.
horseQuestion: Which Horse Pin size is this?
horseRisk: Horse Pin sizes map to different style codes and wholesale packing labels.
lockedDocs: Locked until required questions are answered.
infoNote: You can view the original order anytime while reviewing details.
intakeFileNote: Paste PO text for best results. File uploads are kept as source references when text extraction is unavailable.
sheetsDesc: Editable production and packing documents from the reviewed order.
reviewNeededHelp: Answer the open blockers above, then add the missing style code, quantity, or material/finish to each row.
handoffSubtitle: Create a production-ready packet for the Bali team with production notes, packing details, source evidence, and outstanding items.
handoffBlocked: Resolve required blockers before creating this handoff packet.
handoffReadyDesc: Share status: Ready to share through your usual Bali team channel.
handoffHelperText: Artisan prepares the packet; your team shares it through the usual channel.
includedDesc: Order summary, production timeline, estimated completion, and special notes.
updateDesc: Edit the customer update before copying it.
noRealEmail: Artisan saves the draft only. You still send the message outside Artisan.
tourWelcomeDesc: Workspace for turning wholesale orders into production instructions.
tourIntakeDesc: Paste order text from email, DM, spreadsheet rows, or PO text.
tourSampleDesc: Load a realistic order with size ambiguities.
tourProcessDesc: Process the order and answer only what production needs.
tourReviewBlockersDesc: Artisan identifies missing or ambiguous details. Let's resolve these blockers to unlock production.
tourReadyChecklistDesc: Items that matched the catalog perfectly are listed here, ready for production.
tourContinueToSheetsDesc: Now that blockers are resolved, the continue button is unlocked. Let's move to Sheets.
tourSheetsTabsDesc: Artisan generates editable Production sheets for Bali, a Packing checklist, and a Customer update.
tourExportDesc: Export your sheets as CSV or copy tables to clipboard.
tourContinueToUpdateDesc: Proceed to the final step to draft the status update for the customer.
tourCustomerUpdateDesc: Review the drafted email status update. You can edit the text directly before copying.
tourMarkSentDesc: Mark the order as sent to complete your workspace review.
tourCatalogWelcomeDesc: This is your jewelry master reference. It matches incoming order descriptions to style codes, materials, and Bali artisan notes.
tourCatalogSearchDesc: Quickly find items by Style Code, category, or collection, or filter catalog views by department.
tourCatalogAddDesc: Register new jewelry styles into the master reference database here.
tourCatalogItemDesc: View style code, materials, and production notes in English and Indonesian. Click Edit to update details.
tourCatalogViewDesc: Switch between visual Grid layout and detailed spreadsheet List view.
welcomeSubheading: Automate transcription, catalog lookup, and team coordination for Heather Benjamin Jewelry.
welcomeFeature1: Paste boutique emails, DMs, spreadsheets, or drop order documents directly.
welcomeFeature2: Automatically resolve custom boutique descriptions to official style codes.
welcomeFeature3: Flag missing sizes, finishes, or variants before orders are cast in Bali.
welcomeFeature4: Generate bilingual production sheets, packing checklists, and customer updates instantly.
ordersDashboardDesc: Review incoming orders, track Bali work, and finish customer handoff.
updateMoldsCastingQc: Update molds, casting, and QC tasks
checkPackingRows: Check packing rows and customer update
catalogDesc: Reference grid of every production style with bilingual notes.
spotRateDesc: Audits raw material costs using current spot price.
searchCatalog: Search by code, title, or notes
tryAdjusting: Try a different category or clear the search.
birdOfPreyQuestion: Which Golden Bird of Prey Hat Stud size is this?
birdOfPreyRisk: Size changes the bone carving template, casting mold, and unit price.
starBirdQuestion: Which Black Lip Star with Bird of Prey Dangle finish should Bali make?
starBirdRisk: Finish changes the metal casting, material cost, and production scheduling.
confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this product? This action cannot be undone.
